Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices

Class VacuumCleaner

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.AbstractEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Device
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.VacuumCleaner
All Implemented Interfaces:
DeviceOperationsApi
public class VacuumCleaner
extends Device
This class represents vacuum cleaner.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník

      public VacuumCleaner​(java.lang.String name, Consumption consumption, DeviceState deviceState, java.lang.String descriptionOfAction)

      deviceState - state of device
